FAQPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQPage.description: Everything you need to know about Kulinia, from digital creation to printing your book.

items.a: Simply take a photo of your handwritten or printed recipe. Our AI analyzes the image, identifies ingredients, quantities, and steps, then automatically transcribes them into your book. You can then correct or complete the text if needed.

items.q: Can I import recipes from websites?
items.a: Yes! Just copy the recipe URL. Our tool extracts the useful content (ingredients and preparation) while removing ads and fluff.

items.q: Can I share my book with my family?
items.a: Absolutely. You can generate a sharing link for a single recipe or your entire book. Your loved ones can view it for free on their phone or computer.

items.q: What are the delivery times for the physical book?
items.a: Once your order is confirmed, printing usually takes 2 business days. Home delivery then takes between 3 and 5 days depending on your location.

items.q: Can I choose my book's layout?
items.a: We offer several elegant themes. Once your recipes are selected, our algorithm automatically generates an optimized layout, but you keep control over the cover choice and chapter order.

items.q: What is the 'Bleeds' option in the PDF export?
items.a: This is a technical safety margin. If you choose to print your PDF professionally, these edges prevent white lines when the paper is cut. Your file is thus 100% compliant with printing standards.
Your recipes belong to you. We use SSL encryption for all your data and we never resell your personal information.

gelato.name: Gelato
gelato.meta_title: Kulinia vs Gelato: The best choice for your book?
gelato.meta_desc: Complete comparison between Kulinia and Gelato. Discover why our dedicated cooking solution beats general printing services.
gelato.description: While Gelato is a print-on-demand giant, it lacks the essentials for a cook: software intelligence.
cons: No text recognition for your photos
Generalist service without a culinary soul

canvas.name: Canvas
canvas.meta_title: Kulinia vs Canvas: What's the difference?
canvas.meta_desc: Compare Kulinia and Canvas for creating your family recipe book.
canvas.description: Canvas offers photo books; we create tools for culinary heritage.
cons: Editor not adapted for ingredient lists

photobox.name: Photobox
photobox.meta_title: Kulinia vs Photobox: Which to choose for your recipes?
photobox.meta_desc: Photobox is great for photos, but Kulinia is designed for cooking. Discover why AI changes everything for your book.
photobox.description: Photobox excels at holiday photo albums, but turning your kitchen scribbles into digital text isn't their job. It's ours.
pros: Page format optimized for kitchen reading
Access your recipes on smartphone while shopping

vistaprint.name: Vistaprint
vistaprint.meta_desc: Stop wasting hours on the Vistaprint editor. Kulinia generates your culinary layout in one click.
vistaprint.hero_title: Kulinia vs {name}: Save 10h of layout work
vistaprint.description: Vistaprint is a professional marketing tool. For a recipe book, it's a jackhammer when you need a chef's knife.
pros: Secure cloud backup of your family secrets

blurb.name: Blurb
blurb.meta_title: Kulinia vs Blurb: Create a real cookbook
blurb.meta_desc: Blurb is powerful but complex. Discover how Kulinia simplifies the creation of your culinary legacy.
blurb.description: Blurb targets self-publishers. If you just want a clean, smart, easy-to-fill book, MonCarnet is for you.

mytaste.name: MyTaste
mytaste.meta_title: Kulinia vs MyTaste: Organize your kitchen
mytaste.meta_desc: MyTaste stores web links; we create your book. Discover the difference between an aggregator and a real book.
mytaste.description: Storing internet links is fine, owning your own recipes and being able to print them in a prestige book is better.

cookidoo.name: Cookidoo
cookidoo.meta_title: Kulinia vs Cookidoo: Your own recipes first
cookidoo.meta_desc: Tired of being locked in the Thermomix ecosystem? Take back control of your personal recipes with Kulinia.
cookidoo.description: Cookidoo imposes its recipes on you. Kulinia lets you showcase your own, your grandmother's, and your friends'.
cons: Mandatory subscription for your own notes

manuellement.name: Manually (Paper Notebook)
manuellement.meta_title: Paper Recipe Notebook vs Digital: The Match
manuellement.meta_desc: Why switch from the old spiral notebook to a smart book? Discover the benefits of digitization for your recipes.
manuellement.description: The charm of paper is undeniable, but the loss of a unique recipe is irreversible. Combine the best of both worlds.
pros: Unlimited sharing with loved ones via email/SMS
Eternal backup (no fear of sauce stains)
